news.t: First Trust Changes Investment Strategies, Name and Other Related Matters for First Trust EIP Carbon Impact ETF

holdings.infoBox: FPWR is an equity ETF with a total of 60 individual holdings. The top holdings are US Dollar stock at 6.54%, Duke Energy at 3.36%, The Southern Company at 3.16%, WEC Energy Group at 3.13%, and PPL Corporation at 3.09%.

overview.description: The First Trust EIP Power Solutions ETF (FPWR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking risk-adjusted total return through investments in equity securities of Power Solutions Companies. FPWR was launched on Aug 19, 2019 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Changes Investment Strategies, Name and Other Related Matters for First Trust EIP Carbon Impact ETF
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“FTA”) announces the First Trust EIP Carbon Impact ETF (NYSE Arca: ECLN) (the “Fund”), a series of First Trust Exchange-Traded Fund IV (the “...
